fields.label: Site Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the site containing the collection whose items to add to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Collection Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the collection to add an item to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Live
fields.description: Whether the item should be published on the live site

fields.label: Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fieldValues, fieldValues.fieldId, fieldValues.fieldValue)
